calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Reece R. Halpern appeared via zoom for Francine Ginns (petitioner).
Jonathan Robinson appeared via zoom (pro per) (objector).

Mr. Robinson stated that he is the son of the decedent, that this is not in the best interest of his father, that he discovered his father's passing when he did a welfare check, he is not his biological son but was working on getting adoption paperwork together before his passing.

Mr. Halpern stated that his client has been working with heir search to locate all the decedents heirs, that not all the heirs have been located, and that his client is bondable and worked for the San Francisco Sheriff's Department.

The Court takes this matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozado. Not reported (D204).

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Continued To Jul-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
